summary: Konekt B2B E-commerce Platform - Stripe Payment Integration v136. All 13 backend tests PASSED. Frontend UI verified via Playwright. Stripe checkout creates valid sessions with checkout.stripe.com URLs. Payment URL params (success/cancelled) handled correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe payment integration fully tested and working. POST /api/payments/stripe/checkout/invoice creates valid Stripe checkout sessions with URLs starting with https://checkout.stripe.com/. GET /api/payments/stripe/checkout/status/{session_id} returns transaction status. payment_transactions collection stores pending records. Go-live readiness shows payment_gateway=true and payment_gateway_keys=true. Frontend InvoicesPageV2.jsx shows Pay Invoice button for unpaid invoices and handles payment=success/cancelled URL params correctly.

stripe_checkout_session_creation.details: POST /api/payments/stripe/checkout/invoice creates valid Stripe checkout session with URL starting with https://checkout.stripe.com/, session_id, amount_usd, and amount_tzs

stripe_checkout_status_polling.details: GET /api/payments/stripe/checkout/status/{session_id} returns status, payment_status, invoice_id, and amount_usd

stripe_checkout_validation.details: Correctly rejects paid invoices (400) and invalid invoice IDs (404)

payment_transactions_collection.details: payment_transactions collection gets new record on checkout creation with status 'pending'

frontend_pay_invoice_button.details: Customer invoice drawer shows 'Pay Invoice' button for unpaid invoices with data-testid='pay-invoice-btn'

frontend_payment_url_params.details: Customer invoices page handles payment=success (shows 'Verifying your payment...') and payment=cancelled (shows 'Payment was cancelled') URL params

acceptance_check_1_payer_name.details: Customer invoices show PAYER NAME column with real names (Suwena, John, Mac Geofrey, Federica, Mac, Pendo, Moses, Don)

acceptance_check_2_notifications.details: Customer notifications API returns payment-related notifications

acceptance_check_3_sales_contact.details: Customer orders show sales contact info (Janeth Msuya, Brian Kweka, Neema Mallya)

acceptance_check_4_admin_orders.details: Admin orders show customer, payer, sales, vendor columns with real data

acceptance_check_5_vendor_orders.details: Vendor orders show customer name column via /api/vendor/orders endpoint
